zh-CN.name: 字母X
zh-CN.intro: 字母X是英文字母表中的第24个字母。它看起来像两条交叉的线，就像海盗地图上的标记一样！X是个很特别的字母哦。

story.title: 🗺️寻找宝藏的X
story.body: 在一张大大的藏宝图上，有一个大大的X标记。X说：我就是目标点！所有的小朋友都跟着X出发。左边一条线，右边一条线，交叉在一起，就是藏宝的地方。我们沿着线走啊走，穿过了A字形的山，跨过了S形的小河，终于来到了X标记的地方。挖开泥土，里面藏着闪闪发光的宝石和一本英文字母书！X真厉害，帮助我们找到了宝藏。现在，每次看到X，我们都会想起那次有趣的冒险。

knowledge.title: X为什么像交叉的线？
knowledge.body: 很久以前，人们用X表示交叉或记号。在罗马数字中，X代表数字十，也是因为两条线交叉。现在，X在字母表中还是很特别的字母，很多词都以X开头，比如x-ray（X光）。

en.name: X
en.intro: X is the 24th letter of the English alphabet. It looks like two crossed lines, just like the mark on a pirate map! X is a very special letter.

story.title: 🗺️X Marks the Treasure
story.body: On a big treasure map, there was a big X. X said, I'm the target! All the kids followed X to set off. Left line, right line, crossing together, that's where the treasure was. We walked along the lines, passed the A-shaped mountain, crossed the S-shaped river, and finally arrived at the X spot. We dug up the soil and found shiny gems and an alphabet book! X was so great, helping us find the treasure. Now, every time we see X, we remember that fun adventure.

knowledge.title: Why does X look like crossed lines?
knowledge.body: Long ago, people used X to mean a cross or a mark. In Roman numerals, X stands for ten, also because two lines cross. Now, X is still a special letter in the alphabet, and many words start with X, like x-ray.
